name: discussite
title: Discussite
description: Open an HTTPS URL as a Discussite Site
author: discuss.site

commands.name: start
commands.title: Open in Discussite
commands.description: Open an HTTPS URL as a Discussite Site

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && ray build --skip-types -e dist -o dist
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
